narrative_purpose: Establish the failed frontier, the approaching mechanical threat, and the transition from darkness into the guardian's point of view.

beats.summary: A blackout establishes the failed warning state and distant machine motif.
Fragmentary evidence conveys prior destruction and an overwhelmed defense.
The threat closes in and visually hands off to the guardian.

canonical_facts: The story opens with failed defenses and an approaching mechanical threat.
The threat handoff leads into the guardian's point of view.

tolerances.implementation: Professional equivalents are accepted when semantic beats and handoffs remain measurable.
unresolved_cases: Whether the 29-shot prologue or another complete opening is authoritative.
Which image, video, and audio branches implement this opening.
Which camera and audio specifications are binding.

terminal_artifact: Approved threat-establishment sequence ending on the guardian handoff
